zh.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Gaunt是Gilbert Gand和Alice d'Aubigny的兒子，於大約1220年出生在英國林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆。他與Lora de Baliol結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1273年1月5日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Gaunt是Gilbert Gand和Alice d'Aubigny的儿子，于大约1220年出生在英国林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆。他与Lora de Baliol结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1273年1月5日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gaunt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gant
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ghent in Flanders, Belgium.
English: from Middle English gaunt, gant ‘slim, slender; drawn, thin and angular’.
North German: probably a variant of   Gans   ‘goose’.

variants.name: Gauntt
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Gaunt  .

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Gaunt was born about 1220, in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England as the son of Gilbert Gand and Alice d'Aubigny. He married Lora de Baliol. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 5 January 1273, in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Gaunt est né environ 1220, à Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, fils de Gilbert Gand et Alice d'Aubigny. Il a épousé Lora de Baliol. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 5 janvier 1273, à Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Gaunt wurde um 1220 in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, als Sohn von Gilbert Gand und Alice d'Aubigny geboren. Er hat Lora de Baliol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Januar 1273 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Gaunt è nato il circa 1220 nel Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England come figlio di Gilbert Gand e Alice d'Aubigny. Lui sposato Lora de Baliol. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 5 gennaio 1273, nel Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Gauntは約1220年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフォルキンガムでGilbert GandとAlice d'Aubignyの息子として生まれた。Lora de Baliolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1273年1月5日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフォルキンガムで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.Folkingham, Bourne, Lincolnshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 폴킨그함 위스 로그h턴
ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Gaunt(은)는 대략 1220년 영국 링코실르 폴킨그함에서 Gilbert Gand(와)과 Alice d'Aubigny의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Lora de Baliol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1273년 1월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 폴킨그함에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Gaunt nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra filho de Gilbert Gand e Alice d'Aubigny. Ele casou-se com Lora de Baliol. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de janeiro de 1273, em Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Folkingham, Bourne, Lincolnshire, Englan: фолкингхам вит лотон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Gaunt родился около 1220 г. в местности фолкингхам, линколншир, Англия. Его родителей звали Gilbert Gand и Alice d'Aubigny. Он женился на женщине по имени Lora de Baliol. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 5 января 1273 г. в местности фолкингхам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 5 de enero de 1273, en Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
